description: Canonical lane maturity registry. See feedback_production_hardened_standard_definition_20260430.md for the 7-gate Level 3 standard. Maintained via tools/lane_maturity.py — bare edits OK for seeding but mark/unmark/audit-log are the supported interface going forward.

gate_definitions.impl_complete: Production code lands; no NotImplementedError; all CLI flags wired; all error paths covered.
gate_definitions.real_archive_empirical: Real-archive empirical measurement on Lane G v3 anchor (or equivalent baseline). Tagged [empirical:<artifact>].
gate_definitions.contest_cuda: Actual [contest-CUDA] score from Vast.ai 4090 / Modal A100 / equivalent. NOT [contest-CPU advisory]. NEVER MPS.
gate_definitions.strict_preflight: STRICT preflight check covering the lane's bug class (or warn-only with documented STRICT promotion path).
gate_definitions.three_clean_review: 3-clean-pass adversarial review per CLAUDE.md Recursive adversarial review protocol. Counter at 3/3 with rotating perspectives, no new bugs.
gate_definitions.memory_entry: Memory file documenting empirical result + dispatch metadata + cross-refs.
gate_definitions.deploy_runbook: Deploy script + heartbeat + watchdog + harvest path documented (e.g. scripts/remote_lane_<id>.sh).

level_rules.3: ALL 7 gates satisfied — FULL PRODUCTION HARDENED + RECURSIVE ADVERSARIAL REVIEWED.

lanes.name: Apogee int8 block-FP on PR106 (Pareto-frontier ALMOST LOSSLESS)

contest_cuda.evidence: 0.2112 [contest-CUDA Lightning T4] 2026-05-05T18:02Z IN_PREDICTED_BAND (predicted [0.205, 0.215]); promotion_eligible. Pose 3.38e-5 ~= PR106 3.4e-5 (engineering match). Validates inflate path correctness across the apogee_intN family. +0.0017 vs PR106 = layout overhead only, not a distortion failure.

lanes.notes: PR106 +1.5KB / +0.001 rate. ALMOST-LOSSLESS distortion. Pareto-frontier (int7 dominated by int8 due to bit-aligned packing penalty). Predicted band [0.196, 0.207] vs PR106 baseline 0.20946. Producer + adapter + wrapper landed at 62e3a51c/82ca9456/5c31755e. APOGEE_INTN_BITS=8 env var picks bit-width.

lanes.name: Apogee int7 block-FP on PR106 (Pareto-DOMINATED by int8)

impl_complete.evidence: submissions/apogee_intN/inflate.py (single producer handles all bits 4..8 — int7 is intentionally Pareto-dominated)

real_archive_empirical.evidence: experiments/results/apogee_int7_repack_20260504_claude/repack_metadata.json (205,158 bytes, FALSIFIED — Pareto-dominated by int8 187,731 bytes)

deploy_runbook.evidence: scripts/remote_lane_apogee_intN.sh (shared apogee_intN dispatch script with bits selector + heartbeat + harvest path)

lanes.notes: FALSIFIED 2026-05-04 by tools/apogee_intN_pareto.py — int7 archive is 205,158 bytes (+18,919 vs int8 187,731 bytes) for the same VERY-LOW distortion class. The non-byte-aligned int7 packing requires shift/mask boilerplate per block whereas int8 fits cleanly. Reactivation: only if a future packer eliminates the bit-aligned overhead (e.g., 2x int7 -> 14-bit aligned; or context model on the bit-stream).

lanes.notes: PROPOSAL — pre-registered at L0 per CLAUDE.md. Per-pair (dim_idx, delta_q) sidecar adds ~1.2KB to PR106 archive; predicted -0.00218 score Δ via PR100-vs-PR105 empirical (same arch family, +1124b/-0.00218 = net win). Stacks orthogonally with apogee_intN bit-width reduction. Cost: ~$0.60 (Vast.ai 4090 brute-force search + contest-CUDA eval). Council gate REQUIRED before implementation per design-decisions-non-negotiable. Reactivation: council 5/8 GO + operator approves dispatch. Cross-ref: docs/pr100_latent_sidecar_porting_proposal_20260504.md

lanes.notes: PROPOSAL — pre-registered at L0 per CLAUDE.md. Per-frame 3-byte (Y_offset, dy, dx) sidechannel; ~1-2KB brotli'd. Predicted -0.0005 to -0.0015 score Δ on PR106 base. STACKS orthogonally with lane_pr106_latent_sidecar (latent-space vs pixel-space corrections operate at different forward-pass stages). Stacked predicted ~-0.003 score Δ at ~3KB combined sidechannel cost. Cost: ~$0.60 (brute-force 49×255 dy/dx/Y candidates × 1200 frames on Vast.ai 4090). Council gate REQUIRED per design-decisions-non-negotiable. Implement only AFTER lane_pr106_latent_sidecar lands an empirical result. Cross-ref: docs/codex_metric_yshift_audit_20260504.md
